news-global-econ.title: Pirro warns car theft ring used new tech to quickly access vehicles: 'Gone in 60 seconds'
news-global-econ.description: A federal indictment alleges a car theft ring used electronic Autel devices to steal nearly $1 million in vehicles and ship them to Africa for resale.

news-global-econ.title: Powerful illegal streaming ringleader jailed, fined millions over global operation
news-global-econ.description: A Rolex-wearing illegal streaming ringleader was sentenced to 23 months in prison and fined millions after pirating sports and entertainment content.

news-global-econ.title: Exclusive — 23 Republican State Attorneys General Investigate Ratings Agencies Downgrading Energy Producers over ESG Metrics
news-global-econ.description:
Twenty-three state Republican attorneys general sent a letter to Fitch, S&P, and Moody's for downgrading fossil fuel companies over what they believe are flawed environmental, social, and governance (ESG) metrics.

news-global-econ.title: ESPN reporter unloads on the nasty part of the NFL Draft
news-global-econ.description: NFL Draft night is a massive reality show, and ESPN's Peter Schrager has a plea for viewers and insiders alike: stop spoiling the picks.

news-global-econ.title: Trump envoy to Turkey doubles down after backlash, pushes ‘peace through strength’ policy
news-global-econ.description: U.S. Ambassador to Turkey and Syria envoy Tom Barrack defends controversial remarks on Hezbollah, Turkey’s F-35 access and Middle East governance as pragmatic realism, not policy shifts.

news-global-soc.title: AI Security Breach: Anthropic Investigates Unauthorized Access to Powerful 'Claude Mythos' Model
news-global-soc.description: AI startup Anthropic is investigating reports that a group of users gained unauthorized access to its Claude Mythos model, a powerful AI system that was deliberately released to only a small circle of trusted companies due to its advanced cybersecurity capabi…

news-global-soc.title: Iran seizes ships in Hormuz as US talks falter after ceasefire extension
news-global-soc.description: Iran's Revolutionary Guard seized two ships in the Strait of Hormuz hours after Trump extended the ceasefire, escalating the U.S.-Iran maritime standoff.

news-global-soc.title: High-alcohol, ready-to-drink cocktails spark overconsumption concerns for Gen Z drinkers
news-global-soc.description: High-alcohol BuzzBallz cocktails are trending among Gen Z drinkers, raising experts' concerns about overconsumption and deceptive sweetness masking potency.
